title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they mean back there, right? Is everything okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ARGH!! DIS ISH AWUFL, MY GREAT-GREAT- GRANDDAUGHER YLVA GOES DER!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't lose your wits at a time like this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Giha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that expression again? 'Love is both roses and thorns,' right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TCH! You're such a stick in the mud, gunko!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be even better when their folks show up, right?! I love this game!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they try to hug their kids, the thorns will rip them to pieces! The brats won't even want to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Look at them after that! They'll be bawling themselves when they realize their folks died right in front of them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ST. SUMMERS THORN-THORN fruit (a briar man)

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
